info.title: Agent Paste API
info.description: Workspace-scoped JSON API for publishing and reading Agent View artifacts.

WorkOsBearer.description: WorkOS AuthKit access token forwarded by the web Worker.

CfAccessServiceToken.name: Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion
CfAccessServiceToken.description: Cloudflare Access service-token JWT (rotation agent machine identity).

get.summary: Resolve the authenticated actor and usage policy.

get.summary: Browse cross-workspace audit and operation events (operator only).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return, up to 100. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to one workspace.

parameters.name: actor_type
parameters.description: Filter by actor type (for example platform or member).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by exact action verb.

parameters.name: target_type
parameters.description: Filter by target type.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Filter by request id.

parameters.name: focus
parameters.description: Preset filter: security (lockdowns, key revocation, destructive admin) or lifecycle (workspace, keys, artifacts, uploads, cleanup). Defaults to all.
